  Enpy  =   -3409.793874075162
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.794358545700
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Unl   =    -574.937643601819
  Uxc0  =    -302.744283085085
  Uxc1  =    -302.744283085085
  Ucore =   27404.061078842242
  Uhub  =       0.000000000000
  Ucs   =       0.000000000000
  Uzs   =       0.000000000000
  Uzo   =       0.000000000000
  Uef   =       0.000000000000
  UvdW  =       0.000000000000
  Uch   =       0.000000000000
  Utot  =   -3409.794795374673

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.794795374673
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.795547280683
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.795752533178
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798551513629
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798618253596
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798858187913
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798871220833
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798776960476
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798925736060
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798933369603
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798969139466
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798985204771
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798990233263
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  UpV   =       0.000000000000
  Enpy  =   -3409.798993075924
  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)

  Note:

  Uele:   band energy
  Ukin:   kinetic energy
  UH0:    electric part of screened Coulomb energy
  UH1:    difference electron-electron Coulomb energy
  Una:    neutral atom potential energy
  Unl:    non-local potential energy
  Uxc0:   exchange-correlation energy for alpha spin
  Uxc1:   exchange-correlation energy for beta spin
  Ucore:  core-core Coulomb energy
  Uhub:   LDA+U energy
  Ucs:    constraint energy for spin orientation
  Uzs:    Zeeman term for spin magnetic moment
  Uzo:    Zeeman term for orbital magnetic moment
  Uef:    electric energy by electric field
  UvdW:   semi-empirical vdW energy 
  Uch:    penalty term to create a core hole
  UpV:    pressure times volume
  Enpy:   Enthalpy = Utot + UpV
  (see also PRB 72, 045121(2005) for the energy contributions)
